basic_details.job_title: JNV Porbandar Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for PGT, TGT and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: PGT, TGT, Counsellor, Hostel Superintendent and Skill Teacher
basic_details.short_information: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Porbandar has released the official PGT, TGT, Counsellor, Hostel Superintendent and Skill Teacher Notification 2026. The notification has been issued for contractual teaching and non-teaching positions through the Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Porbandar Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications including M.Sc, Bachelor's Degree in Music, M.A., Graduation from a recognized University, and Graduate/Post Graduate/Diploma in Hospitality & Tourism/Hotel Management can participate in the walk-in interview scheduled on 23 July 2026. Candidates must satisfy the

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: PGT Chemistry: 50 years, TGT Music: 50 years, Counsellor: 28-50 years, Hostel Superintendent: Min 35 years, Skill Teacher: Not specified
age_limit.details: PGT Chemistry: Maximum age limit is 50 years. TGT Music: Maximum age limit is 50 years. Counsellor: Minimum age limit is 28 years and maximum age limit is 50 years. Hostel Superintendent: Minimum age limit is 35 years. No engagement or extension beyond 62 years as on 01.05.2026. Skill Teacher - Hospitality & Tourism: Age limit not specified.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc, Bachelor's Degree in Music , M.A., Graduate from a recognized University, Graduate/Post Graduate/Diploma in Hospitality & Tourism/Hotel Management.
qualification.details: PGT Chemistry: M.Sc. Chemistry (50%) + B.Ed. Experience in Hindi & English desirable. TGT Music: Bachelor's Degree in Music (50%). Skilled In Instruments Like Keyboard/Congo/Flute/Harmonium/Tabla Etc. Experienced preferred. Counsellor (Male and Female): M.A./M.Sc. (Psychology) with regular one-year Diploma in Guidance & Counselling. At least one year's experience in Guidance and Counselling in educational institutes. Hostel Superintendent (Female): Graduate from a recognized University. Min. 5 years in Pay Level-5 or 07 years' experience on consolidated pay not less than 29200/-. Skill Teacher - Hospitality & Tourism: Graduate/Post Graduate/Diploma in Hospitality & Tourism/Hotel Management. Industry/teaching experience will be preferred.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview for preparing a panel on contractual basis

content_sections.heading: JNV Porbandar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the JNV Porbandar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download JNV Porbandar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JNV Porbandar Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PGT Chemistry: M.Sc. Chemistry (50%) + B.Ed. Experience in Hindi & English desirable. TGT Music: Bachelor's Degree in Music (50%). Skilled In Instruments Like Keyboard/Congo/Flute/Harmonium/Tabla Etc. Experienced preferred. Counsellor (Male and Female): M.A./M.Sc. (Psychology) with regular one-year Diploma in Guidance & Counselling. At least one year's experience in Guidance and Counselling in educational institutes. Hostel Superintendent (Female): Graduate from a recognized University. Min. 5 years in Pay Level-5 or 07 years' experience on consolidated pay not less than 29200/-. Skill Teacher - Hospitality & Tourism: Graduate/Post Graduate/Diploma in Hospitality & Tourism/Hotel Management. Industry/teaching experience will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: JNV Porbandar Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: JNV Porbandar Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: PGT Chemistry: Maximum age limit is 50 years. TGT Music: Maximum age limit is 50 years. Counsellor: Minimum age limit is 28 years and maximum age limit is 50 years. Hostel Superintendent: Minimum age limit is 35 years. No engagement or extension beyond 62 years as on 01.05.2026. Skill Teacher - Hospitality & Tourism: Age limit not specified.

content_sections.heading: JNV Porbandar Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in Interview for preparing a panel on contractual basis

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for JNV Porbandar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for JNV Porbandar?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 23rd July 2026. Candidates should report at the specified time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The available posts include PGT Chemistry, TGT Music, Counsellor, Hostel Superintendent, and Skill Teacher - Hospitality & Tourism.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for PGT Chemistry?
faq.answer: For PGT Chemistry, candidates need to have an M.Sc. in Chemistry with 50% marks and a B.Ed. degree.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for the Hostel Superintendent post?
faq.answer: For the Hostel Superintendent post, there is a note regarding age: No engagement or extension beyond 62 years as on 01.05.2026.

faq.question: Q5. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring original and one copy of self-attested certificates, Aadhaar card, photos, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the reporting time for the interview?
faq.answer: The reporting time for the interview is 09:30 AM on 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for these contractual posts.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis for the Academic Session 2026-27.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum age for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Counsellor post is 28 years.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Porbandar located?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Porbandar, Gujarat.
